instruction: Return only Rust code. Define pub fn calculate_fee(byte_len: usize, fee_per_byte: u64) -> Option<u64>. Convert byte_len to u64 with try_into().ok()? and use checked_mul for the fee.
Return only Rust code. Define pub fn calculate_storage_fee(bytes: usize, fee_per_byte: u64) -> Option<u64>. The function returns None if bytes cannot fit into u64 or if multiplication overflows.
